abstract: We propose an attention variant that reduces compute on long synthetic sequence benchmarks.
title: Evaluation Paper: Efficient Attention for Synthetic Sequences

abstract: We ablate normalization choices on a synthetic suite and find no consistent winner.
title: Evaluation Paper: A Synthetic Ablation Study of Normalization

abstract: We revisit curriculum learning under a controlled synthetic data generator.
title: Evaluation Paper: Synthetic Curriculum Learning Revisited

abstract: We identify a regime where synthetic pretraining hurts downstream synthetic-task accuracy.
title: Evaluation Paper: Limits of Synthetic Pretraining

abstract: A new synthetic graph benchmark suite designed to stress-test length generalization.
title: Evaluation Paper: Synthetic Graph Benchmarks for Generalization

abstract: We show a popular synthetic evaluation metric is highly sensitive to seed choice.
title: Evaluation Paper: On the Fragility of a Synthetic Metric

abstract: Withdrawn by authors after a synthetic data leak was discovered in the training split.
title: Evaluation Paper: Withdrawn Synthetic Submission

abstract: A synthetic-benchmark contribution whose review cycle has not yet resolved.
title: Evaluation Paper: Synthetic Cycle Still Under Review
